title: Bipartite Graph Matching and the Stable Matching Problem
description: A bipartite graph showing two disjoint sets (Applicants and Employers) connected by edges representing preference rankings, illustrating the core concepts of matching problems in graph theory.
relationships: Connections from elements in Set U to Set V show applicant preferences
Connections from Set V to Set U show employer preferences
A 'matching' is a subset of edges without common vertices
A 'stable matching' has no blocking pairs where an applicant and employer prefer each other over their current match
